name: Dieter's Mock Chocolate Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs with water until thick and lemon-colored.
2. Gradually add Light rum and frozen orange juice concentrate to the egg mixture. Continue beating until well combined.
3. Slowly incorporate Equal into the mixture while stirring continuously.
4. Add cocoa powder and mix thoroughly.
5. Form small balls of the mixture using a spoon or cookie scoop.
6. Allow the truffles to stand at room temperature until the outside is dry before serving.
